summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Meeting Room Credits system. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly for both Admin (Clients page) and Member Portal (Dashboard and Bookings page).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/companies returns companies with meeting_room_credits field
Backend: GET /api/companies/{id} returns total_credits and remaining_credits fields
Backend: GET /api/companies/{id}/credits returns detailed credits info (company_id, company_name, total_seats, credits_per_seat, total_credits, credits_used, remaining_credits)
Backend: Credits calculation formula verified: Total Credits = Total Seats × Credits per Seat
Backend: GET /api/member/company-credits returns company credits for logged-in member
Backend: GET /api/member/me includes credits fields (meeting_room_credits, credits_used, credits_remaining)
Backend: POST /api/member/bookings deducts credits from company balance (480 → 420 after 60 min booking)
Backend: DELETE /api/member/bookings/{id} restores credits to company balance (420 → 480 after cancellation)
Backend: To Be Honest Circle LLP has 480 total credits (4 seats × 120 mins)
Backend: Apex Legal Eagles has 240 total credits (2 seats × 120 mins)
Frontend Admin: Clients page shows credits badge for each company (e.g., '120 min credits')
Frontend Admin: Expanded client details show Meeting Room Credits section with Credits/Seat, Total Credits, Credits Used, Balance Credits
Frontend Admin: Progress bar shows percentage remaining
Frontend Member: Dashboard shows Balance Credits prominently in welcome header (480 mins)
Frontend Member: Dashboard shows Company Meeting Room Credits card with Total/Used/Balance and progress bar
Frontend Member: Bookings page shows 'Credits Remaining: 480 min' in top right
Frontend Member: Bookings page shows booking rules including credits policy
critical_code_review_comments: Credits calculation correctly implemented: total_credits = total_seats × meeting_room_credits
Booking creation properly deducts credits from company's remaining_credits
Booking cancellation properly restores credits to company's remaining_credits
Member portal correctly shows company-level credits (not individual member credits)
Admin panel shows detailed credits breakdown with progress bar visualization
Booking rules clearly displayed including credits policy for cancellations/no-shows
seed_data_creation: Used existing companies: To Be Honest Circle LLP (4 seats × 120 mins = 480 credits), Apex Legal Eagles (2 seats × 120 mins = 240 credits)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting Room Credits system fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/companies/{id} (returns total_credits, remaining_credits), GET /api/companies/{id}/credits (detailed credits info), GET /api/member/company-credits (member's company credits). Booking flow: POST /api/member/bookings deducts credits, DELETE /api/member/bookings/{id} restores credits. Frontend displays credits in Admin Clients page (badge + expanded section) and Member Portal (Dashboard header, Credits card, Bookings page header).

credits_calculation.formula: Total Credits = Total Seats × Allocated Minutes per Seat
credits_calculation.example: To Be Honest Circle LLP: 4 seats × 120 mins = 480 total credits

admin_endpoints.GET /api/companies/{id}/credits: Returns detailed credits breakdown with recent bookings

member_endpoints.GET /api/member/company-credits: Returns company credits for logged-in member

admin_frontend.clients_page: Shows credits badge (e.g., '120 min credits') for each company
admin_frontend.expanded_view: Shows Meeting Room Credits section with Credits/Seat, Total Credits, Credits Used, Balance Credits, progress bar

member_frontend.credits_card: Shows Company Meeting Room Credits with Total/Used/Balance and progress bar
member_frontend.bookings_page: Shows 'Credits Remaining: 480 min' in header, booking rules including credits policy
